official_functions.role: Construct the official ClientInformation record used as the packet payload input
Write the official Configuration serverbound client_information body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed client_information packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed client_information packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded ClientInformation record from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the client_information body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundClientInformationPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundClientInformationPacket preserves the ClientInformation record produced by ClientInformation.createDefault().

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded record fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime client settings send behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized runtime behavior or Configuration-to-Play readiness.
